name: Chicken Provencal
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Canned low sodium or homemade chicken broth
½ cup Pitted ripe olive halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim ends of eggplant; cut into 1-inch slices, then into 1-inch cubes.
2. Cut onion into quarters.
3. In a large skillet, sauté eggplant, onion, and garlic in 1 tablespoon hot oil until the eggplant is crispy and onion is lightly browned.
4. Place the mixture in a large bowl.
5. Heat remaining 3 tablespoons of oil in the skillet. Brown chicken pieces on all sides over moderately high heat; drain on paper towels.
6. Wipe out the skillet.
7. Return chicken to the skillet; add broth and marjoram. Bring to boiling; lower heat; cover.
8. Simmer for 30 minutes, turning occasionally, until chicken is tender. Remove to serving platter; keep warm.
9. Place eggplant mixture, tomatoes, and olives in the skillet. Cook, stirring constantly, until heated through.
10. Spoon over chicken.
